source.submodule: Array of structure and nested structure

topicTags: Array of structure and nested structure

content.problemStatement:
You are given $N$ points on a 2-d cartesian plane.\
You need to find the largest euclidean distance between any two points.

Hint - Eucliedian Distance
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 10^3$
- $1 \leq N \leq 10^3$
- $1 \leq A_i \leq 10^9$
- The sum of $N$ over all testcases does not exceed $2\cdot 10^3$
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input will contain a single integer $N$, denoting the number of points.
- Information about point consists of 1 line of input, each line has 2 integers $x_i$ and $y_i$ - the x-coordinate and the y-coordinate of $i^{th}$ point.
content.outputFormat: - A single floating number, the largest distance between any two points in the given input.
